zh.lifeSummary: 當Sibyl de Ferrers於1216年7月25日出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾時，她的父親William de Ferrers 4th Earl of Derby54歲，母親Agnes of Chester42歲。她於1234年之前與John de Vipont Lord of Appleby在英國英格蘭維斯特莫藍德布盧加姆 卡素結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1246年7月25日在英國英格蘭維斯特莫藍德阿波萊比享年30歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sibyl de Ferrers于1216年7月25日出生在英国英格兰德比夏爾时，她的父亲William de Ferrers 4th Earl of Derby54岁，母亲Agnes of Chester42岁。她于1234年之前与John de Vipont Lord of Appleby在英国英格兰維斯特莫藍德布盧加姆 卡素结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1246年7月25日在英国英格兰維斯特莫藍德阿波萊比享年30岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ferrers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire (Eure) and Ferrières (Manche).

variants.name: Ferris
meanings: Irish and Scottish: shortened Anglicized form of Irish Ó Fearghuis or Ó Fearghasa ‘descendant of Fearghus’, or from the Scottish-Gaelic form of this personal name, Fearghus (see Fergus ).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire, Eure and Ferrières, La Manche in Normandy, France.

variants.name: Ferridge
meanings: English: unexplained; possibly a form of Ferris and therefore a variant of Ferrers .

nameMeanings.name: Sibyl
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Sybil .  Even in classical times there was confusion between the two vowels in this word.

en.lifeSummary: When Sibyl de Ferrers was born on 25 July 1216, in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William de Ferrers 4th Earl of Derby, was 54 and her mother, Agnes of Chester, was 42. She married John de Vipont Lord of Appleby before 1234, in Brougham Castle, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 25 July 1246, in Appleby, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 30.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sibyl de Ferrers est née le 25 juillet 1216, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Ferrers 4th Earl of Derby, avait 54 ans et sa mère, Agnes of Chester, avait 42 ans. Elle a épousé John de Vipont Lord of Appleby avant 1234, à Brougham Castle, Westmorland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 25 juillet 1246, à Appleby, Westmorland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 30 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sibyl de Ferrers am 25. Juli 1216 in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Ferrers 4th Earl of Derby 54 und ihre Mutter Agnes of Chester 42. Sie hat vor 1234 in Brougham Castle, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom John de Vipont Lord of Appleby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 25. Juli 1246 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Appleby, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sibyl de Ferrers è nata il il 25 luglio 1216 nel Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William de Ferrers 4th Earl of Derby, aveva 54 anni e sua madre, Agnes of Chester, aveva 42 anni. Lei sposato John de Vipont Lord of Appleby prima del 1234, nel Brougham Castle, Westmorland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 25 luglio 1246, nel Appleby, Westmorland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 30 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sibyl de Ferrersが1216年7月25日にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアで生まれた時，父William de Ferrers 4th Earl of Derbyは54歳，母Agnes of Chesterは42歳であった。1234年以前にイギリスイギリスウエストモーランドブロウアム カストルでJohn de Vipont Lord of Applebyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1246年7月25日にイギリスイギリスウエストモーランドアップレビーで30歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sibyl de Ferrers(이)가 1216년 7월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Ferrers 4th Earl of Derby(은)는 54세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes of Chester(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 1234년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트모를랜드 브루그함 카스틀에서 John de Vipont Lord of Appleby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1246년 7월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트모를랜드 애플레비에서 30세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sibyl de Ferrers nasceu em 25 de julho de 1216, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Ferrers 4th Earl of Derby, tinha 54 anos e sua mãe, Agnes of Chester, tinha 42 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Vipont Lord of Appleby antes 1234, em Brougham Castle, Westmorland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 25 de julho de 1246, em Appleby, Westmorland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 30 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sibyl de Ferrers родилась 25 июля 1216 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William de Ferrers 4th Earl of Derby было 54 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes of Chester, 42. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Vipont Lord of Appleby перед 1234 г. в местности броугам кастл, вестморланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 25 июля 1246 г. в местности эпплеби, вестморланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 30 лет.
